def positive_yaml_config_loaded_without_safe_loader():
    rule_id = "yaml_config_loaded_without_safe_loader"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "YAML configuration file loaded with yaml.load instead of yaml.safe_load or yaml.load + Loader=SafeLoader."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
